<!--
This repository contains documentation, examples, and templates — not source code
for the TwsRtdServer binary product itself. Pull requests are welcome for:

  - Documentation corrections / clarifications
  - FAQ additions
  - Example workbook improvements
  - Typos / formatting

Pull requests against the binary product's source are not in scope here (the
source lives in a private repository). For commercial inquiries (source license,
OEM redistribution), please open a Discussion instead.
-->

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences on what this PR changes and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Documentation fix / improvement
- [ ] FAQ addition
- [ ] Example workbook change
- [ ] CI / repo plumbing
- [ ] Other (please describe)

## Checklist

- [ ] I read the [contributing notes in the README](../README.md) and this PR fits the documentation-only scope of the repository.
- [ ] If this PR touches the README or FAQ, claims have a primary source I can link to in the review thread.
